_rationale.purpose: Parity proof for DART-MWm23vqgX9O6: `lci search --word-regexp` must mirror Go. Go's findAllMatchesWithOptions (engine.go:314) rewrites a non-regex word-boundary search into \b<quoted>\b regex; C++ post-filters the literal-match engine's rows checking byte boundaries on the matched line. Equivalent semantics, no std::regex in the hot path (Karpathy rule: byte-level only).
_rationale.implementation: src/cli/search.cpp apply_word_boundary() — reads the matched line via read_match_line, checks left/right of [column, column+match.size()) for non-word bytes (\w = [A-Za-z0-9_]).
_rationale.tier: stable: stdout must match Go byte-for-byte after standard text_normalize (DEBUG strip, mode-label collapse, timing scrub).
